src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Wrap blocking token provider call in Mono.fromCallable to prevent blocking the Netty event loop.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: Blocking calls on the Netty event loop cause thread starvation and application hangs; Spring WebFlux requires non-blocking code paths.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Add import for Schedulers to support the new reactive blocking wrapper.
Remove unused import of SignatureAlgorithm as it is replaced by Jwts.SIG enum in JJWT 0.12.x.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: SignatureAlgorithm is no longer used in the code; keeping it is unnecessary but not strictly breaking if unused, however it's part of the API migration cleanup.

Reformat method signature and body for better readability and consistent indentation.
